name: paperclip
description: AI agent orchestration (Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode / Hermes via hermes-bin volume)

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.prompt: OpenAI API key (used by codex CLI and hermes provider=openai-codex) — optional

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.prompt: Anthropic API key (used by claude CLI and hermes provider=anthropic) — optional

env.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env.prompt: OpenRouter API key (used by opencode CLI and hermes provider=openrouter) — optional
